=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and his Band
BOB DYLAN
Tokyo, Japan International Forum Hall A
February 10, 1997

Unknown rec. Received in a trade as a Holy Grail recording.
great sound



01. Crash On The Levee (Down In The Flood)
02. If Not For You
03. All Along The Watchtower 
04. Shelter From The Storm
05. Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues 
06. Silvio 
07. O Babe It Ain't No Lie (acoustic) ( 1964 Elizabeth Cotten estate) 
08. Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) 
09. Love Minus Zero/No Limit (acoustic)


01. Stuck Inside of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 
02. You're A Big Girl Now 
03. Highway 61 Revisited
(encore) 
04. Like A Rolling Stone 
05. Girl From The North Country (acoustic) 
06. Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 (with Dave Steward on guitar)
